title: Random Recipes
description: Random Recipes is a Data Pack designed to create a unique survival experience by shuffling every single crafting recipe in the game.
body:
**Forget everything you know about Minecraft.**
Are you tired of the same old survival progression? Do you want to spice up your next playthrough? **Random Recipes** is a Data Pack designed to create a unique survival experience by shuffling every single crafting recipe in the game.

## 🛠️ How it works

This Data Pack changes the output of crafting tables, furnaces, and more.
**The logic is simple: expect the unexpected.**

### 🎲 Want a fresh Randomization?
The version available for download here acts as a "Curated Seed". If you have already beaten this one, or want to generate your own unique recipes, visit our official generator:

👉 **[Generate a NEW Random Pack here](https://bluestarmc.com/random_recipes)**

## 📺 Video Showcase

My partner released a YouTube video where he challenges himself with the randomized recipes in Hardcore mode: please check it out and support him! He is really passionate and his content is entertaining. (it's in French, but YouTube probably has a dubbing option):

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kOHBnK-sOws" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## 📥 Installation

1.  Download the `.zip` file.
2.  Open your Minecraft world folder.
3.  Place the file into the `datapacks` folder.
4.  Type `/reload` in-game or restart your world.
5.  **Enjoy!**

---
